field_changes.old:
Thanks to your feedback, the Sweat Community can now enjoy continued updates throughout the app to make it even better. New to Sweat with this update: 

• Introducing Guided Runs on Sweat. Lock your screen during our new running workouts without pausing your session, and let guided audio coach you through every interval.

Love Sweat? Rate us 5 stars and share your love with the community!
